chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-369 of 2001 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.03.2022. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Vinod Kumar G. Jessrani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. --------------------- At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the instant constitutional petition is involving factual controversy, therefore, he would not press its disposal before this Court on merit, provided the petitioner is permitted to exhaust his remedy before the Civil Court having jurisdiction with direction that the issue of limitation, if arises, to be considered in terms of Section 14 of the Limitation Act sympathetically, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
